title: taraxacum taraxacum var. alpinum
intro: Taraxacum taraxacum var. alpinum, also known as Alpine Dandelion or Small Dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Taraxacum taraxacum var. alpinum include its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, liver and kidney problems, and even some types of cancer. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, although its efficacy and safety may vary depending on the preparation method and individual tolerance.
